title: craftable arcane essence
description: Adds simple crafting recipes for Arcane Essence using Lapis Lazuli combined with Amethyst Shards or Diamonds. An addon for Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks.
body:
Description
Craftable Arcane Essence is a lightweight addon for the Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks mod.

Are you running out of Arcane Essence for your spells and scroll crafting? Tired of hunting mobs just to refill your magic supplies? This mod adds two balanced crafting recipes that allow you to convert your precious resources into Arcane Essence directly at a crafting table.

Features & Recipes:
Amethyst Conversion: Surround 1 Amethyst Shard with 8 Lapis Lazuli to get 7 Arcane Essence.

Diamond Conversion: Surround 1 Diamond with 8 Lapis Lazuli to get 9 Arcane Essence.

Requirements:
This mod requires Iron's Spells 'n Spellbooks to function.

No other dependencies are needed.

Perfect for mages who want to focus on casting spells rather than grinding for loot!
